text: Mijo, just checking on you. Haven't heard from you in a few days
Sorry mamá, been swamped with service. I'm good though, miss you
Ay okay, just wanted to make sure. Come eat Sunday yes? I'll make your favorites
Mijo, todo está bien? No has llamado en días
Sí papá tranquilo, ando bien nomás con mucho trabajo. ¿Y tú cómo estás?
Aquí bien, extrañándote. Llámame cuando puedas, tu mamá también pregunta por ti
Are we still doing the call tmrw? mom keeps asking me if you confirmed
yes yes!! 4pm my time works, tell her to stop stressing lol
LMAO ok I'll let her know, don't be late or she'll call you 47 times
hey you, how's your day going?
honestly exhausting lol but better now that u texted. miss u
almost done here, wanna call later tonight?
hey daniel just checking in, how are you feeling after yesterday? that was a long one
haha yeah still tired honestly but good! think the new menu went over really well tbh
it did!! get some rest, you earned it. see you thursday
Ey Daniel! Cuánto tiempo sin saber de ti, todo está bien por allá?
Carlos!! todo bien gracias a dios, aquí tirando. Y tú? Cómo está la familia?
Ahí vamos, la señora ya se recuperó gracias. Oye hay que vernos pronto para ponernos al día!
Morning Daniel — Boone Hall heirlooms looking gorgeous this week, deep red. Want a full case?
Yes, full case of the heirlooms and two flats of the sungolds if you have them.
Filé powder came in from the upcountry guy. Grabbed you two bags before they walked.
You're a lifesaver. Add them to Tuesday's drop.
Heads up — okra's peaking, tender and small. Perfect for the escabeche you mentioned.
Perfect, I'll take five pounds. Testing an okra escabeche for the truck menu.
Photo of the Keegan-Filion pork bellies — these are the ones for your pork belly torta.
Those look incredible. Reserve four for me for the weekend service.
Bad news — the heat wrecked half the peppers. Can only do half your Fresno order Tuesday.
No worries, I'll stretch what we have and fold in the fermented batch.
Carolina Gold rice from Marsh Hen Mill is back in. Restocked your usual 25 lb bag.
Great, keep one on standing order every two weeks.
Price bump on the gulf shrimp — up 80 cents a pound this week, red tide down in Florida.
Noted, I'll adjust the aguachile pricing on the specials board.
Got benne seeds from Anson Mills, the real deal. Enough for your wafers and the trout crust.
Yes to all of it. This is exactly what the spring menu needs.
Brunch at Millers Sunday? I'll grab us a table by 10:30 before the line hits.
Yes. I'll bring the batch of chili so you have lunch for the week.
Your Monday off — dinner at my place or you cooking at yours?
Mine. Testing the smoked duck taco and I need an honest palate.
That duck taco last night was unreal. You should put it on the menu already.
Margaux is intrigued but noncommittal. Give it time.
Found a little coffee spot on Upper King you'd love, dark roast, no nonsense.
Say less. Saturday morning before prep?
How was the close? You sounded wrecked on the phone.
Brutal but clean. Home now, feet are done. See you tomorrow.
My class did a 'favorite food' project and three kids said tacos because of your Instagram lol.
That's the whole business plan validated right there.
Rain Sunday — still up for the Johns Island market or lazy morning?
Market. Rain never stops the good tomato vendor.
Talked to you Thursday but wanted to say the tamales made it, froze half. Gracias, Ama.
Bueno mijo. Send me a photo when you make the pozole with the chiles.
Will do. Using the guajillos in a torta glaze too, you'd approve.
Your tia asked about the truck. I told her it's a secret for now, no te preocupes.
Appreciate it. Only Danny knows for real. Keeping it close til the plan's solid.
Are you eating? Real food, not just tasting spoons at work.
Batch-cooked stew Sunday, eating fine. Promise.
Papa says the Vespa scares him. I told him you wear the helmet.
Always. Tell him it's safer than the kitchen honestly.
Care package going out this week — dried chiles, canela, and the good vanilla.
You spoil me. I'll track it and text when it lands.
Austin brunch report: breakfast taco with brisket. Threat level: you need to visit.
That's a torta filling waiting to happen. Sending you my brisket notes.
Sent you a meme about sous chefs. It's you. It's literally you.
I refuse to confirm or deny.
Moon's huge tonight — did you see? Sending the photo, swap me a food pic.
Beautiful. Here's tonight's plating, charred corn elote.
When's the truck happening? I want to design the merch, unpaid, out of love.
Two years, hopefully. And yes, you're hired in spirit.
Startup life is chaos. Tell me kitchen life is also chaos so I feel normal.
Kitchen life is controlled chaos. You'd hate the hours, love the food.
Monday beers, my pick this week. The Granary at 6?
In. Bringing the commissary numbers, want your gut check.
Ran the torta bread math — local baker beats par-baked if we hit volume.
That's what I figured. Adds a supplier relationship though, let's talk it through.
Saw a truck for sale on the peninsula, needs work but the price is right.
Send the listing. Might be a Zillow-for-trucks situation but I'm curious.
You good after that double? Text me you made it home.
Made it. Aching. Worth it. See you Monday.
Prep list for the festival pop-up is on Box. Review before Tuesday.
Got it, reviewing tonight. I'll flag the shrimp count, it looks light.
The duck taco — put it up as a Friday special. Let's see the numbers.
On it, chef. I'll cost it out and set a special board price.
Good service tonight. The line held. Nice work with the new preps.
Thank you, chef. The team stepped up.
